channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NAZARA] Nazara Technologies Invests INR 14.99 Crores in Rusk Media for 1.36% Stake
item.description:
Nazara Technologies Limited has entered into a Share Subscription Agreement with Rusk Media Private Limited to subscribe to its 1,278 Pre Series C Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares for an aggregate consideration of INR 14,98,99,176. The investment aims to create a scripted reality esports or gaming universe, with Nazara having exclusive monetization rights on the IP that will be created. The transaction is expected to complete within 60 days.

  • Nazara Technologies to invest INR 14.99 crores in Rusk Media
  • Investment represents 1.36% stake in Rusk Media on fully diluted basis
  • Partnership aims to create a scripted reality esports or gaming universe
  • Nazara to have exclusive monetization rights on the IP created
  • Transaction expected to complete within 60 days

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nazara Technologies Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [MINDSPACE] Mindspace Business Parks REIT Announces Trading Window Closure for FY2026
item.description:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT has announced that the trading window for dealing in the securities of Mindspace REIT will be closed from April 1, 2026. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Policy on Unpublished price sensitive information and dealing in securities. The trading window will open 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results of Mindspace REIT for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026.

  • Mindspace Business Parks REIT announces trading window closure for FY2026
  • Closure in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to open 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for Q4 and FY2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mindspace Business Parks REIT | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MCX] MCX Subsidiary Transfers Rs. 50 Lakh as 'Financial Disincentive' on SEBI Directions
item.description:
Multi Commodity Exchange Clearing Corporation Limited (MCXCCL), a subsidiary of Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd., has transferred Rs. 50 Lakh to its Core Settlement Guarantee Fund as a 'Financial Disincentive' in accordance with SEBI Circular no. SEBI/HO/MRD1/DTCS/CIR/P/2021/590 dated July 05, 2021. The transfer was made on March 27, 2026, following a technical glitch on January 28, 2026. There is no impact on the operations or other activities of the MCX and MCXCCL arising out of the Financial Disincentive. The financial impact to the extent of disincentive is mentioned above.

  • MCXCCL transferred Rs. 50 Lakh to its Core Settlement Guarantee Fund as 'Financial Disincentive'
  • Transfer was made in accordance with SEBI Circular no. SEBI/HO/MRD1/DTCS/CIR/P/2021/590 dated July 05, 2021
  • Transfer was due to a technical glitch on January 28, 2026
  • No impact on operations or other activities of the MCX and MCXCCL
  • Financial Disincentive amounted to Rs. 50 Lakh

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MULTI COMMODITY EXCHANGE OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [EFCIL] EFC (I) Ltd. to Consider Funds Raising at Board Meeting on April 3, 2026
item.description:
EFC (I) Ltd. has informed the BSE that a Board Meeting is scheduled on April 3, 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the proposal of raising funds by way of issuance of equity shares or other eligible securities through permissible modes. This includes private placement, qualified institutions placement, preferential issue, right issue, or any other method or combination of methods as permitted under applicable laws. The fundraising is subject to regulatory/statutory approvals and the approval of shareholders of the Company. In accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, the Trading Window in respect of dealings in the securities of the Company will remain closed from 30th March, 2026 until Forty-Eight (48) hours after the announcement of Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) of the Company for the Quarter and Year ended 31st March, 2026.

  • EFC (I) Ltd. to consider funds raising at Board Meeting on April 3, 2026
  • Proposal includes issuance of equity shares or other eligible securities through permissible modes
  • Fundraising subject to regulatory/statutory approvals and shareholders' approval
  • Trading Window in respect of dealings in the securities of the Company to remain closed from 30th March, 2026
  • Closure until 48 hours after the announcement of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EFC (I) Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [CAPITALT] Capital Trust Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Capital Trust Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons, their immediate relatives, and those with access to unpublished price sensitive information. The closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) (Amendment) Regulations, 2018. The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026, up to 48 hours after the declaration of financial results and annual accounts of the company for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for approval of financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Capital Trust Ltd closes trading window for designated persons
  • Closure in compliance with SEBI regulations
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026, to 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Board Meeting date for approval of financial results to be intimated later
  • Applies to designated persons, their immediate relatives, and those with access to unpublished price sensitive information

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAPITAL TRUST LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NAZARA] Nazara Technologies Acquires Remaining Shares in Subsidiary Next Wave Multimedia
item.description:
Nazara Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about the acquisition of equity shares of Next Wave Multimedia Private Limited, a subsidiary of the Company. The acquisition of 4,188 equity shares, representing 12.56% of the equity share capital of Nextwave, was made from the existing promoter-founder shareholders on March [.], 2026. The total consideration was INR 7,50,08,955. This acquisition has resulted in Nazara Technologies owning 100% of Nextwave, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.

  • Nazara Technologies acquired 12.56% equity shares of Next Wave Multimedia for INR 7,50,08,955.
  • Next Wave Multimedia has become a wholly owned subsidiary of Nazara Technologies.
  • The acquisition was made from existing promoter-founder shareholders.
  • The acquisition increased Nazara Technologies' equity shareholding in Nextwave from 87.44% to 100%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nazara Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SGLTL] Standard Engineering Technology Ltd Receives Tax Demand Notice from Telangana Government
item.description:
Standard Engineering Technology Ltd (Formerly known as Standard Glass Lining Technology Limited) has received an Order dated March 30, 2026, passed by the Office of the Assistant Commissioner (State Taxes), Government of Telangana, under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 read with the Telangana Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017. The demand notice is for the financial year 2019-20 and relates to a difference in taxable value in comparison with E waybills. The expected financial implication on the listed company is nil as per the company's statement. The company is in the process of evaluating the order and will take appropriate steps including filing an appeal before the appropriate appellate authority within the prescribed timelines.

  • Standard Engineering Technology Ltd received a tax demand notice from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner (State Taxes), Government of Telangana.
  • The demand notice is for the financial year 2019-20 and relates to a difference in taxable value in comparison with E waybills.
  • The expected financial implication on the listed company is nil as per the company's statement.
  • The company is in the process of evaluating the order and will take appropriate steps including filing an appeal before the appropriate appellate authority within the prescribed timelines.
  • The matter pertains to a historical period and does not affect the ongoing business operations. The company remains committed to high standards of corporate governance, compliance and transparent financial reporting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Standard Glass Lining Technology Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [JAINREC] Jain Resource Recycling Ltd Acquires Equity Shares in Three Captive Generating Plant Companies for Captive Use of Electricity
item.description:
Jain Resource Recycling Ltd has approved the acquisition of equity shares in three Captive Generating Plant (CGP) companies, namely Sea Sindu Green Energy Private Limited, Sri Kamakshi Wind Power Private Limited, and OM Sakthi Wind Power Private Limited. The acquisition is for the captive use of electricity by the Company and is in compliance with the minimum ownership requirement prescribed under Electricity Rules, 2005 for qualifying as a captive user. The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 74,09,000/- (Rupees Seventy-Four Lakhs Nine Thousand Only).

  • Acquisition of equity shares in three Captive Generating Plant companies
  • Total consideration of Rs. 74,09,000/-
  • 26% equity shareholding in each of the above entities
  • Compliance with Electricity Rules, 2005
  • Acquisition for captive use of electricity

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RSYSTEMINT] R Systems International Ltd Appoints Farooq Ahmad as Chief Revenue Officer
item.description:
R Systems International Limited has appointed Mr. Farooq Ahmad as the Chief Revenue Officer on March 30, 2026. Mr. Ahmad, a seasoned leader in the IT services industry with nearly three decades of experience, brings deep expertise in strategy, global business development, P&L management, and customer success. He has held senior leadership positions at HCL Technologies and Brillio. Mr. Ahmad holds a B.Sc. Engineering degree from Z.H. College of Engineering & Technology, AMU, Aligarh and an MBA from Elkin B. McCallum Graduate School of Business, Bentley University, Massachusetts, USA.

  • R Systems International Ltd has appointed Mr. Farooq Ahmad as the Chief Revenue Officer.
  • Mr. Ahmad has nearly three decades of experience in the IT services industry.
  • He brings deep expertise in strategy, global business development, P&L management, and customer success.
  • Mr. Ahmad has held senior leadership positions at HCL Technologies and Brillio.
  • He holds a B.Sc. Engineering degree and an MBA from prestigious universities in India and the USA.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R Systems International Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GMRP&UI] GMR Power and Urban Infra Acquires Additional 2.37% Stake in GMR Kamalanga Energy for Rs. 60 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GMR Power and Urban Infra Limited’s subsidiary, GMR Energy Limited, has acquired 5,09,80,769 Equity Shares of GMR Kamalanga Energy Limited from IDFC First Bank Limited. This acquisition, made at a consideration of Rs. 60 Crore, will consolidate the Company's stake in GKEL close to about 100%, thereby improving strategic control. GKEL operates a 1050 MW coal-based plant with a turnover of Rs. 3017 Crore for FY 2024-25.

  • GMR Energy Limited acquires 2.37% stake in GMR Kamalanga Energy Limited from IDFC First Bank Limited
  • Transaction consideration amount is Rs. 60 Crore
  • This acquisition will consolidate the Company's stake in GKEL close to about 100%
  • GKEL operates a 1050 MW coal-based plant
  • GKEL's turnover for FY 2024-25 was Rs. 3017 Crore

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
